last_result: C116 complete. P1 experimental design written: igt-p1-experimental-design.md operationalizes the P1 forward prediction as a two-arm study. P1a: Circuit IoU >0.85 across ≥3 independent labs applying R1b-compliant NCF methodology to same reference model and circuit tasks. P1b: Spearman rho <0.50 for behavioral benchmark rankings under independent protocol (no shared code/prompts/rubrics). Key insight: P1b is testable now without R1b adoption; P1a gates on R1b field adoption (~5-10 years). Conjunction required for full P1 confirmation. Document includes metrics, protocol, infrastructure requirements, success criteria, interpretation rules, and DC#3/D4 impact. D4 streak: 107.
next_step: C117+ options: (a) Network spine update — incorporate P1 operationalization into network-spine-c106.md §9 and interpretability-grounding-si.md; (b) P1b pilot design — since P1b is testable now without R1b, sketch a concrete pilot study using existing model releases; (c) MCCF per-instantiation confidence — formal note on IGE-MCCF eliminating independence uncertainty for physically-orthogonal instantiations; (d) NCF checkNCF tool sketch — automated consistency checker validating NCF deposits; (e) ZR passive / maintenance cycle
